svg.title: Exact phrase hit counts
svg.desc: The same one-document fixture matches a bag-of-words query and a phrase query with slop one, but not a phrase query with zero slop.

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', sans-serif
